freshrss.name: FreshRSS
freshrss.description: FreshRSS integration — aggregated news feed via the Google Reader API

instanceUrl.label: FreshRSS URL
instanceUrl.description: Base URL of your FreshRSS instance.

apiPassword.label: API Password
apiPassword.description: Your FreshRSS API password — enable it in FreshRSS profile settings.

category.label: Category
category.description: Filter by a FreshRSS category name. Leave empty to show all feeds.

unreadOnly.label: Unread only
unreadOnly.description: Only show articles you have not read yet in FreshRSS.

showOnDesktop.label: Show on desktop
showOnDesktop.description: Display the feed on the home page on desktop too (horizontal scrolling).
